# Dolly's Mirror

## Relic Text

- Upon pickup, obtain an additional copy of a card in your Deck.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Best when copying a premium upgraded engine or answer card; compare against removal plus potion when the deck is already near the Act 2 size limit.
